title: erythroxylum ferrugineum f. myrtoides
intro: Erythroxylum ferrugineum f. myrtoides is a variety of the Erythroxylum ferrugineum plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Erythroxylum ferrugineum f. myrtoides include its ability to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
